mapper.sql: id, task_name, task_group, task_params, status, start_time, end_time, duration, result, error_message, error_stack, server_ip, server_name, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_task_execution_log SET task_name = #{taskName}, task_group = #{taskGroup}, task_params = #{taskParams}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, result = #{result}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_stack = #{errorStack}, server_ip = #{serverIp}, server_name = #{serverName}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_task_execution_log SET deleted = TRUE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_task_execution_log SET deleted = TRUE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE start_time < #{threshold} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE status = 'FAILURE' AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(duration), 0) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE duration IS NOT NULL AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(duration), 0) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE duration IS NOT NULL AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(duration), 0) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE duration IS NOT NULL AND deleted = FALSE
